name: io.github.clicksprotocol/mcp-server
description: Autonomous DeFi yield for AI agents on Base. Query APY, simulate splits, manage treasury.

environmentVariables.description: Private key for write operations (register, deposit, withdraw). Not needed for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: CLICKS_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base RPC URL. Defaults to https://mainnet.base.org
environmentVariables.name: CLICKS_RPC_URL
